<?php /** * This code was generated by * \ / _ _ _| _ _ * | (_)\/(_)(_|\/| |(/_ v1.0.0 * / / */ namespace Twilio\TwiML\Voice; use Twilio\TwiML\TwiML; class SsmlBreak extends TwiML { /** * SsmlBreak constructor. * * @param array $attributes Optional attributes */ public function __construct($attributes = []) { parent::__construct('break', null, $attributes); } /** * Add Strength attribute. * * @param string $strength Set a pause based on strength */ public function setStrength($strength): self { return $this->setAttribute('strength', $strength); } /** * Add Time attribute. * * @param string $time Set a pause to a specific length of time in seconds or * milliseconds, available values: [number]s, [number]ms */ public function setTime($time): self { return $this->setAttribute('time', $time); } }
